title: Kid and Law Challenge Big Mom
description: On pages 12–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So you're not gonna let me go retrieve my weapon, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...you always played it cool in front of us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: never showing a hint of weakness.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Holy crap, look at the scale of that thing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: even if it's the old man, if he takes a direct hit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You really think he can't dodge such an un- controlled attack?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If he refuses to take the brunt of his son's full power!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're gonna sail these seas, do it while carrying my name on your back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll let you go as wild as you want!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Why do all of you people....

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
